div.head: The Chargé in Haiti (Jordan) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Port au Prince, December 29, 1921—10 p.m.
[Received December 30—9:55 a.m.]

div.p: 93. Department’s 72, December 20, 6 p.m. and 73, December 29, 1 p.m. Haitian Minister of [Finance] states through Minister of Foreign Affairs that Haitian Government is prepared to pay note in question and will request from the bank for the purpose, the statutory loan of $600,000 held by bank in accordance with article 15 of bank concession and $500,000 in the hands of the bank in conformity with article 8 of the transaction signed at Washington July 10, 1916.Foreign Relations, 1916, p. 358.
